title: Inspect the Hardhat and npm integration points for contract size reporting
description: Confirm where the report should live, which existing files expose developer commands, and which Solidity outputs under contracts/ should be included or excluded from the report.

title: Add a Hardhat task that reports deployed contract sizes
description: Register a size-contracts task in hardhat.config.js that compiles the project, reads artifact deployedBytecode, filters to concrete project contracts, computes EIP-170 usage, and prints a sorted report.

title: Expose the contract size report through package.json
description: Add an npm script such as `size` that invokes `hardhat size-contracts` so the report is reachable through the repository's standard script interface.

title: Verify the contract size report output
description: Run the size command after installing dependencies to confirm compilation succeeds, concrete contracts are listed, interface-only artifacts are skipped, and the reported metric uses deployed runtime bytecode.
